name: FileInput
visual_summary: Input field that allows users to select a file from their computer. Used for uploading files to the server.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: FileInput
Description: Input field that allows users to select a file from their computer. Used for uploading files to the server.
Style: flat, filled
Interactions: clickable, hover
Tags: file, input, upload

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// packages/@mantine/core/src/components/FileInput/index.ts
import type { FileInputFactory, FileInputProps } from './FileInput';

export { FileInput } from './FileInput';

export type { FileInputProps, FileInputFactory };
